description: Luxury living without the luxury price tag. 2,188 sq. ft., 4 bedrooms, 3 bathrooms, single story, 2-car garage. Designed with growing families in mind, this beautiful single-story home offers the perfect balance of comfort, style, and affordability. Why continue paying high rent when you could invest in a home that gives you space, stability, and elevated living? Step into custom-grade  finishes, a thoughtfully designed layout, and a welcoming community filled with resort-style amenities and a friendly atmosphere you'll love coming home to. Affordable luxury meets everyday functionality in a home built for memories, entertaining, and your next chapter.

A huge backyard with endless possibilities, custom grade finishes throughout, super low tax rate, and zoned to exemplary schools. Luxury living with space to entertain and relax. 4 spacious bedrooms, 3 beautiful bathrooms, and an entertainment room designed for movie nights and game days. This home blends custom-grade finishes with thoughtful design, creating the perfect space for family, friends, and unforgettable gatherings. Step outside and enjoy resort-style amenities including a lazy river, scenic walking trails, and community spaces that make every day feel like a getaway. A home that offers comfort, style, and a lifestyle you deserve.

Where space, comfort, and functionality come together beautifully. 5 spacious bedrooms and 4 well-appointed bathrooms create a layout that truly functions the way a home should. Designed for both everyday living and unforgettable gatherings, this home features a media room perfect for movie nights, game days, and entertaining. Situated on a corner lot with an oversized backyard, there's plenty of room to relax, entertain, or create the outdoor oasis you've always imagined. All of this is nestled in a welcoming community that feels like home the moment you arrive.
